sessionName: Long Z1 60 min (punted from Sat, Adj #123)
intro: Punted W10 long run, Sat→Sun (Adj #123) — mirrors last week's punt (Adj #104). Hyp B already done Sat; no lift today.

flags: AM Achilles/knee/SI status wasn't recorded yesterday — report it today (Adj #120/#123).
cardio.workout: 60 min Z1 long run: 5 min easy build, 50 min steady Z1, 5 min easy cooldown.

targets.pace: 9:45–10:45/mi (§4.A Z1 band) — hold the honest ~10:45 ceiling, no creep (Adj #96/#106)
targets.hr: ≤155 (Run Z1 cap, off-191 lock) — anchor by pace per Adj #9, zones skew low for running

cardio.warmup: 5 min easy build 10:30→9:45/mi, cadence building toward 165–172
cues: Vomero Plus, not Zoom Fly 6 — long-run shoe rule while Achilles occasionally reactive (Adj #34).

currentLoads.note: Hold 145 — reps cleared 3×5 again (set 2 nudged RIR 1 vs W9's 0) but set 3 still to failure (RIR 0) vs the RPE 7 / RIR 2-3 target; top of linear LP (e1RM ~163 ≈ TM), +5 to 150 only on a cleaner set-3 RIR. TM 162 stands; next §5 re-test ~W12 (Adj #107)
160 bump partial — sets 1-2 held the 8-rep floor, sets 3-4 collapsed to 6 reps RIR 0, below the 4×8-10 floor. Hold-until-clean NOT met → hold 160, re-attempt clean set 3 (Adj #115)
First full 3-set outing since the reset; set 1 RIR 2 = first real headroom since the Adj #98 reset collapse, sets 2-3 to failure. Hold 75, rebuild progressing (Adj #116)
6-set growth dose; openers still soft (RIR 3/3), back half a hair stronger than W9 Tue (set 4 RIR 1 vs 0), set 6 = 11; hold 30 — don't bump on soft openers (Adj #108)
All 4 sets landed inside the 12-15 band, set 2 hit 15 (not just the last set) — best within-band consistency of the cycle. Hold 30, bump-eligible if it repeats (Adj #117)

Set 1 at 65 hit the literal 12-rep target but only to true failure, pre-exhausting everything after; even the Tue-clean 60 only produced 6/6. §3.A (Tue 4×10) vs §3.B (Sat 4×12) rep-target mismatch — Tue's bump-eligibility doesn't transfer to Sat's harder ask. Hold 60; next 65 attempt should leave RIR 1-2 on set 1 (Adj #118)

Sets 1-3 repeat the Adj #84 pattern (12 across, set 3 to failure), set 4 dropped to 6 (worse than Adj #84's last-set 12). Hold-until-clean still NOT met. Elbow pain not recorded — §10.A 4-wk clock stays reset. Hold 22.5 (Adj #119)
Bump 125→130 LANDED (Adj #95) — set 1 RIR 3 = the prescribed RPE 7 / RIR 3 intensity (vs 125's RIR 4+); joint-health slot, role unchanged; hold 130 (Adj #112)

345 set 1 clean (12 reps RIR 1) then collapsed; backoff to the proven-clean 335 also failed both sets (11/8, both RIR 0), well below its 12/12/12/12 mark. AM Achilles status not recorded — needed to separate tendon vs fatigue. Hold 335; re-attempt 345 only on a reported-clean AM (Adj #120)
Openers clean RIR 2 (improvement), but set 3 to failure again → add-load gate still NOT met. Hold BW (Adj #122)
Both sets to true failure — regression from last week's clean RIR 2/1; likely late-circuit/whole-session fatigue given today's broader pattern. Hold 130, no bump (Adj #121)
